title: Internal Error when setting group icon via WHAPI
symptom: When attempting to set an icon for a group using WHAPI, a 500 Internal Error occurs intermittently.
applies_when: Using WHAPI to set group icon
not_this_if: Error does not occur when the group is fully initialized
root_cause: The error occurs because the group is not fully ready for the requested actions. Specifically, the participant list is not yet accessible, leading to a failure when trying to set the icon or perform other actions.
fix_steps: Implement a loop in the workflow to check if the participant list is accessible
Continue the workflow only when the participant list is populated with numbers
agent_instruction: Add a loop to your workflow that waits until the participant list is available before proceeding.
